query:
SELECT pp.id, pp.subcategory, pp.uploadedBy, pp.projectId, pp.createdAt, u.name as uploaderName, u.role as uploaderRole
FROM projectPhotos pp 
LEFT JOIN users u ON pp.uploadedBy = u.id
WHERE pp.subcategory = 'corte'
ORDER BY pp.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
